mapper.select: SELECT DISTINCT large_category AS value FROM new_category ORDER BY large_category
SELECT DISTINCT medium_category AS value FROM new_category WHERE large_category = #{largeCategory} ORDER BY medium_category

if.test: req.largeCategory != null and req.largeCategory != '' and req.largeCategory != 'ALL' and req.largeCategory != '전체'
req.mediumCategory != null and req.mediumCategory != '' and req.mediumCategory != 'ALL' and req.mediumCategory != '전체'
req.smallCategory != null and req.smallCategory != '' and req.smallCategory != 'ALL' and req.smallCategory != '전체'

mapper.select:
SELECT id, large_category AS largeCategory, medium_category AS mediumCategory, small_category AS smallCategory, created_at AS createdAt, updated_at AS updatedAt FROM new_category
ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT #{req.limit} OFFSET #{req.offset}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO new_category ( large_category, medium_category, small_category ) VALUES ( #{largeCategory}, #{mediumCategory}, #{smallCategory} )
